english_text: My last day is next Friday
My boss makes me want to quit
I do not see a future here
I got a job offer elsewhere
I need to follow my passion
I want to start my own business
My health is suffering from this job
I cannot grow in this position
I prepared for this for a long time
My boss tried to convince me to stay
I am having a farewell dinner
My colleagues threw me a farewell party
I am relieved but also nervous
I did my best at this company
I am grateful for the experience
Taking a break before my next job
I will travel during the break
I am open to new opportunities
I have enough savings for now
But it was the right one
Every ending leads to a new beginning
I deserve a job that makes me happy
korean_text: 나는 행복한 일을 할 자격이 있어
romanization: naneun haengbokan ireul hal jagyeogi isseo

english_text: My best chapters are still ahead
